en: It's over. There is nothing to go after here.
ko: 여기서 더 이상 쫓을 게 없어요.

en: There's nothing to accomplish. How can we believe anything you say?
There's no telling where the lies begin and end.
ko: 거짓이 어디서 시작되고 끝나는지 알 수 없어요.

en: That affair of yours, did that even happen? Please, look.
ko: 당신의 그 사건, 정말 있었던 일인가요?

en: Junior just found out that my cancer is back.
ko: 제발, 주니어가 제 암이 재발했다는 걸 방금 알았어요.

en: He's already facing the idea of living without his father.
ko: 그는 이미 아버지 없이 살아야 한다는 생각을 하고 있어요.

en: To put this on top of that, it's just not right.
I swear to God, you start throwing the word right at me. What I mean...
ko: 하나님께 맹세해요, 당신이 '옳다'고 저에게 던지기 시작해요.

en: Was it right to run a drug empire? There is no drug empire.
Lying to your son, to all of us, is that right? What do I have to do to make you believe me?
ko: 아들에게, 우리 모두에게 거짓말하는 게 옳은 건가요?

en: Why don't you kill yourself, Walt? What?
ko: 왜 스스로 죽지 않나요, 월트? 뭐라고요?

en: Just kill yourself. This whole thing dies with you, right? That's what you're saying here?
ko: 그냥 죽어버리세요. 이 모든 건 당신과 함께 끝나잖아요, 그렇죠?

en: Is that Hank should just let it go and wait for you to die?
ko: 행크가 그냥 포기하고 당신이 죽기를 기다려야 한다는 건가요?

en: Or maybe you should just go ahead and die, then.
